title: West Bengal: TMC candidate Jahangir Khan withdraws from Falta repoll 2 days ahead of voting
content: Trinamool Congress candidate Jahangir Khan has withdrawn his nomination for the Falta re-poll, days before voting. The Election Commission had previously scrapped the original polls due to severe electoral offenses and subversion of the democratic process. Observer reports highlighted significant irregularities, including EVM tampering and voter intimidation. This development follows criticism from West Bengal Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari.

title: Why SC refused to recall its stray dog relocation order: 'Can’t remain oblivious to harsh realities'
content: The Supreme Court dismissed pleas to recall its stray dog relocation and sterilization order, issuing directions to states to augment infrastructure. The court allowed euthanasia for rabid or dangerous stray dogs, emphasizing the need for expert assessment and adherence to animal welfare laws.

title: 'Ladke jhool nai paate, they are treated as criminals': Mother-in-law on Twisha Sharma 'dowry' death
content: A model-actor's suspicious death case in Bhopal intensifies as her husband, a lawyer, is denied anticipatory bail and a reward is offered for his arrest. Allegations of dowry harassment and abetment to suicide are being probed by a Special Investigation Team. Conflicting claims emerge from both families regarding the circumstances leading to her death.

title: What RR, PBKS, KKR, DC and CSK need to do to grab the final IPL 2026 playoff spot
content: The race for the final IPL playoff spot intensifies with five teams vying for one berth. Rajasthan Royals are best positioned, needing just one win, while Punjab Kings control their destiny. Kolkata Knight Riders, Delhi Capitals, and Chennai Super Kings require victories and favorable results elsewhere. Every remaining match significantly impacts the playoff picture.

title: How India’s fuel price rise compares to US, China, Pak & other economies
content: Economists say that if the situation does not improve in the coming days, then more hikes may be in the offing. However, the approach of gradual hikes in petrol and diesel prices is to avoid an immediate inflation shock to the economy.

title: These are the two tech words that Americans almost 'dread and hate'
content: Americans are increasingly wary of artificial intelligence, with many believing it's advancing too rapidly and expressing negative views. This sentiment extends to AI data centers, which face significant local opposition due to environmental concerns like high energy and water consumption. Consequently, several states are considering or enacting restrictions on new data center construction.

title: 'We are proud democracy': MEA vs Norwegian press during PM Modi's 4th leg of five-nation tour
content: Ministry of external affairs pushed back against press freedom queries during PM Modi's Norway visit, citing a lack of understanding of India's scale and reliance on "ignorant NGOs." This followed a Norwegian journalist's claim that PM Modi avoided her question. The MEA defended India's democratic framework and rights, highlighting its vast population and media landscape.

title: ‘Kya middle stump udaya bey’: Rohit’s funny act leaves MI, KKR in splits | Watch
content: Ahead of a crucial IPL 2026 clash, Rohit Sharma lightened the mood with a hilarious impression of KKR coach Abhishek Nayar during Mumbai Indians' training.  While Rohit's antics brought laughter, Kolkata Knight Riders face immense pressure to win against MI to keep their playoff hopes alive, despite a recent resurgence.

title: BJP MLA’s mobile phone snatched during morning walk in Raipur
content: A senior BJP leader's phone was snatched in Raipur during a morning walk, sparking a political row over law and order. Police swiftly apprehended a 19-year-old suspect and recovered the device within eight hours. The incident drew criticism from the Congress, which questioned the effectiveness of the city's police commissionerate system amidst rising crime rates.

title: Anthropic CEO makes a 'doomsday' prediction for software companies
content: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei told WSJ at the World Economic Forum in Davos that software is heading toward being "cheap, maybe essentially free," warning that whole careers built around writing code may not survive the AI shift. The Anthropic chief executive also predicted SaaS incumbents leaning on code complexity as a moat could "go bust" as ServiceNow, Snowflake and Microsoft stocks slide and Anthropic eyes a $900 billion valuation.

title: Delhi horror: Man sets himself ablaze outside wife’s house amid matrimonial dispute
content: A man tragically died by self-immolation in northwest Delhi's Jahangirpuri following a heated argument related to an ongoing matrimonial dispute. He reportedly threatened suicide before setting himself ablaze outside his wife's home. Police are investigating the precise sequence of events leading to this devastating incident.

title: 'We're also trying to provide for our family': Jhingan as ISL faces another crisis
content: As Indian football faces uncertainty, 148 top-tier players, including captain Sandesh Jhingan, will be out of contract on May 31 with no renewal discussions. With negotiations stalled between clubs and the AIFF over the commercial partner, there's no clear roadmap for next season. Players and staff fear job losses with clubs seriously contemplating closing down.

title: 'Anil Pandit USA’ to ‘Manna Brampton’: Why new-age gangsters prefer foreign suffix
content: North India's notorious gangsters are shedding village-based aliases for international monikers like 'Fateh Portugal' and 'Manna Brampton'. This shift signals a globalized underworld, using foreign locations for intimidation and to evade local law enforcement.  These 'global franchises' now target celebrities and operate with a transnational reach, posing a significant challenge to policing worldwide.

title: After ‘admitting’ Nvidia share fell to zero, CEO says China must decide market protection
content: Nvidia's market share in China has fallen to zero. CEO Jensen Huang believes the market will eventually reopen. US President Donald Trump discussed chip issues with Chinese leaders. China is prioritizing homegrown chips from companies like Huawei. This situation poses a significant risk to Nvidia's substantial business opportunities in the region.

title: India's best-looking Mahindra Scorpios? Check new Indian Air Force SUV fleet
content: The Indian Air Force has received a new fleet of Mahindra Scorpio Classic S11 SUVs, distinguished by a striking Air Force Blue paint job. These rugged, rear-wheel-drive vehicles, powered by a 130 bhp diesel engine, are a familiar sight in defense and government services. Spotted on Delhi roads, these specially finished Scorpios stand out, showcasing their unique military livery.

title: Has Russia lost 10% of its refining capacity? Ukraine launches drones as Moscow attacks Danube port city
content: Ukraine launched drone strikes on Russian regions, including those housing oil infrastructure, while Russia retaliated with attacks on Ukrainian port facilities. President Zelenskyy highlighted a significant drop in Russia's oil refining capacity due to these actions. Efforts to end the protracted conflict remain stalled, with both sides continuing cross-border strikes and accusing each other of targeting vital infrastructure.

title: Historic Big Bash opener in Chennai likely to feature Perth against Sydney
content: Chennai's MA Chidambaram Stadium is set to make history by hosting the opening match of the Big Bash T20 League in December. This landmark event marks the first time a foreign franchise league game will be played on Indian soil. Cricket Australia officials have inspected the venue, signaling a significant step in strengthening India-Australia cricketing ties.

title: SC rejects plea to stay earlier order on stray dogs; cites 'absence of sustained efforts' by states
content: The Supreme Court has refused to stay its order for stray dog removal from public institutions, citing the failure of state governments to implement Animal Birth Control Rules. The court emphasized that the right to life includes living free from the threat of dog bites and directed high courts to monitor compliance.

title: 'Provided Rs 50,000 regularly': Twisha's mother-in-law counters dowry allegations
content: A model's suspicious death has triggered a legal storm in Bhopal, with a court rejecting the anticipatory bail plea of her absconding husband, Samarth Singh. His mother, a retired judge, also accused, was granted bail. The family alleges dowry harassment and murder, claims denied by the accused who cite the deceased's alleged mental health issues.

title: ‘Tn07 Cm 2026’ scene goes viral: Venkat Prabhu gifts GOAT plate to CM Vijay
content: Director Venkat Prabhu presented Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay with the 'TN07 CM 2026' number plate from the film 'The Greatest of All Time'. This gesture comes after a scene from the 2024 movie, featuring Vijay with the same registration, went viral, with fans now viewing it as a political prediction for the 2026 elections.

title: Delhi HC issues contempt notice to Kejriwal, Sisodia over ‘vilifying’ posts against judge
content: Delhi High Court has issued notices to Arvind Kejriwal, Manish Sisodia, and other AAP leaders in a criminal contempt case. This action stems from alleged defamatory social media posts targeting a judge after she declined to recuse herself from the Delhi excise policy case. The court noted a campaign to portray the judge as biased, distinct from fair criticism.

title: Builder hasn't delivered your flat: What RERA says and how to file a complaint
content: Homebuyers facing delayed possession or unfair practices by builders now have legal recourse under RERA. The Act empowers buyers to seek compensation for delays or opt for a full refund with interest.  It's crucial to file complaints early with supporting documents to protect your rights and investment.

title: How soaring crude prices are hitting India: Explained in 10 charts
content: Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East are significantly impacting India's economy. Rising crude oil prices have led to a Rs 3 per litre fuel hike, eroded investor wealth by over Rs 5.85 lakh crore, and pushed the rupee to an all-time low. Foreign investors are also withdrawing funds, while the import bill has surged.

title: ‘My body is little weak’: MS Dhoni’s comment to Raina sparks retirement fears
content: Suresh Raina urged MS Dhoni to play IPL 2027, dismissing concerns about his fitness after CSK's loss.  Fans at Chepauk were emotional, fearing it was Dhoni's last home game.  Despite the defeat, Dhoni's presence and lap of appreciation captivated the crowd, leaving his future uncertain but fueling hope for another season.

title: BJP civic chief offers Rs 1 crore reward for beheading Trinamool MP Saayoni Ghosh
content: A BJP leader in Uttar Pradesh announced a Rs 1 crore reward for beheading a Trinamool Congress MP over an old social media post. The remarks, made during a protest against alleged insult to Hindu deities, have sparked a political row. The MP had previously stated her account was hacked when the post was made.

title: ‘We’re judged on results’: Stephen Fleming breaks silence on his CSK future
content: Chennai Super Kings' playoff hopes are slim after a home defeat, casting a shadow over head coach Stephen Fleming's future. Fleming acknowledged his tenure rests with CSK management, while backing captain Ruturaj Gaikwad's transition. Injuries and a squad overhaul presented challenges, though MS Dhoni's influence remains significant despite not playing.

title: CBSE answer sheet portal delay: When will the Class 12 access link go live?
content: Several CBSE Class XII students expressed confusion on social media after the board’s answer sheet access portal failed to activate on May 19 despite an announced application window. Students sought clarity regarding the timing of the link and the distinction between obtaining evaluated answer scripts and applying for re-evaluation. CBSE clarified that re-evaluation applications will open separately from May 26 to May 29. The board also acknowledged that evaluation errors may occur while assessing nearly 1.25 crore answer scripts annually.

title: Will govt monetise gold held by temples? Centre responds
content: The government has firmly refuted widespread rumors about a plan to monetize gold held by temples and religious institutions. Asserting that such claims are "completely false" and "without any basis," officials clarified that no scheme is being prepared to convert temple gold into bonds or designate it as "Strategic Gold Reserves.

title: ‘Sanju Samson should be captain’- Ex-India cricketer wants CSK to sack Gaikwad
content: Manoj Tiwary has questioned Ruturaj Gaikwad's captaincy for Chennai Super Kings, citing his batting struggles and the pressure of succeeding MS Dhoni. Tiwary suggests Gaikwad needs to build his own identity rather than live up to comparisons, and hints at Sanju Samson as a potential captaincy candidate for next season.

title: Don’t allow bulldozer culture to enter Maharashtra, this is not UP or Bihar: Bombay HC
content: The Bombay High Court's Aurangabad bench criticized the Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar Municipal Corporation for arbitrarily demolishing properties linked to AIMIM corporator Mateen Patel and resident Hanif Khan. The court noted the violation of Supreme Court guidelines, including the mandatory 15-day notice period, and stated the action rendered families homeless.

title: Petrol, diesel price hike: Congress targets Centre, takes 'inflation man' swipe at PM Modi
content: Fuel prices have seen their second hike in less than a week, with petrol and diesel increasing by approximately 90 paise per litre. This follows a nearly four-year freeze by state-run oil companies, with prices now reaching their highest levels since May 2022. Opposition parties allege the freeze was timed to end after state elections.

title: Ishan Kishan’s whistle taunt at Chepauk crowd goes viral after SRH beat CSK - Watch
content: Ishan Kishan's brilliant 70 powered Sunrisers Hyderabad into the playoffs, defeating Chennai Super Kings. After a match-winning performance, Kishan engaged with the home crowd with a celebratory gesture. He revealed his innings was motivated by his cousin's presence, who was there during a difficult family time. The wicketkeeper-batter emphasized his goal to finish the game for his family.

title: 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' woos international audiences; called 'best Indian movie of the year'
content: 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' is a global sensation, topping Netflix's Top 10 charts worldwide. Audiences are hailing it as the year's best Indian film, praising its grand scale, thrilling action, and emotional depth. The sequel's intense sequences even draw comparisons to Hollywood blockbusters, while its box office success continues, nearing Rs 1,800 crore.

title: Rai of Hope: Punjab da putt-ar wins PGA title
content: Aaron Rai, a British golfer of Indian heritage, has achieved a historic victory at the 2026 PGA Championship, becoming the first of Indian origin to win a major golf title. His understated precision and remarkable 68-foot birdie putt secured his win against top players, marking a significant moment for Indian golf and diaspora success.

title: Fuel price hike: Delhi-NCR to see 3-day strike by cab, auto drivers starting Thursday
content: Commercial vehicle drivers in Delhi-NCR are striking May 21-23, demanding an immediate taxi and auto fare hike.  Unions cite 15 years of stagnant fares despite soaring fuel and operational costs, and allege exploitation by app-based aggregators.  A protest is planned for May 23, with threats of further escalation if demands aren't met.

title: Bank manager dies after falling from 15th floor while drying mats in Gurgaon
content: An assistant bank manager tragically died after falling from the 15th floor of a Gurgaon high-rise. The 37-year-old reportedly slipped while drying mats and carpets on the terrace. Preliminary investigations suggest an accidental fall, with police examining CCTV footage.

title: 24-year-old Telangana student dies in US road accident; several injured
content: A 24-year-old Indian student, Navya Gadusu, died in a road accident in the United States. She was on her way home from a part-time job when her vehicle was struck by a speeding car. The incident occurred on Saturday night. Three other individuals sustained injuries in the collision.

title: Price prediction: Why gold rates are unlikely to rise too much - check today's outlook
content: Gold price prediction today: Gold prices are unlikely to rise too much unless crude oil prices come down for a longer term duration, says Praveen Singh, Head Currencies and Commodities, Mirae Asset ShareKhan.

title: Blood Clot In Brain, Ruptured Spleen: Greater Noida Woman's Autopsy Report
content: The post-mortem findings are consistent with severe physical assault leading to critical external injuries.

title: "Deliberate Thought After 88 Hours Was Smart Power": Army Chief On Op Sindoor
content: The Army Chief said today, the "world around us is sending a more complex signal -- disorder, distrust, and dichotomy in alliances".

title: "She Said Dad If Things Don't Work Out...": Twisha Sharma's Parents Break Down
content: Twisha Sharma's father claimed that her 33-year-old daughter was being subjected to various forms of abuse, including physical abuse.

title: Women Spend 42% More Time On Shopping, OTT, Messaging Apps Than Men: Report
content: Women in the 18-24 age bracket spend up to 47 per cent more time on commerce apps than men, making them one of the most valuable user groups.

title: Who Is Sibi George? Indian Diplomat At Centre Of Norway Media Exchange
content: George highlighted India's 5,000-year-old civilisation, the country’s democratic traditions and contributions during the Covid-19 pandemic.

title: Day After Tourist's Death, Elephant That Trampled On Her Dies In Karnataka
content: Marthanda, a 35-year-old male elephant, had suffered severe injuries during a fight with another elephant, Kanjan. The incident had taken place during a bathing session in the Cauvery River at the camp.

title: Petrol Diesel Price LIVE Updates: Fuel Prices Up Again, Petrol, Diesel Costlier By Around 90 paise
content: Petrol Diesel Price Hike Live Updates: In Delhi, petrol now costs Rs 98.64 per litre, up from Rs 97.77, while diesel has increased to Rs 91.58 from Rs 90.67. This follows an earlier hike of Rs 3 per litre on Friday.

title: Probe Into Twisha Sharma's Death Under Scanner Over A Belt, Mix-Ups In FIR
content: Questions relating to the investigation into Twisha Sharma's death concern a belt she allegedly used to hang herself and serious discrepancies in the police FIR in the case.

title: Trump Threatens Fresh Strikes On Iran. How Tehran Could Respond
content: Intensifying attacks on Arab energy infrastructure-- like oil fields, refineries and ports -- is one of the most potent ways in which the Islamic Republic could inflict pain on the global economy and put pressure on Trump.

title: US Iran War News Live Updates: Trump Holds Off Iran Attack Planned For Tuesday After Gulf Intervention
content: US Iran War News LIVE Updates: Israel launched a massive series of airstrikes on southern Lebanon, despite an extension of the truce between the two countries.

title: Adani Group Stocks Rally Day After US Drops All Charges Against Gautam Adani
content: Multiple US regulatory and legal investigations involving the group have all closed in the last couple of days.

title: Twisha Sharma's Husband Samarth Singh Is NLS Graduate, Lawyer Since 2018
content: Samarth Singh's educational profile includes B.A. LL.B. (Hons) from NLSIU Bangalore and an exchange programme at Belgium's Ghent University.

title: In 2024, He Raised Voice Against NEET Paper Leak. Today, He Is An Accused
content: Shivraj Raghunath Motegaonkar, the founder of Renukai Chemistry Classes (RCC), has been arrested over his alleged involvement in the NEET UG paper leak.

title: "Pushed Into Glamour, Disowned By Parents": Twisha Sharma's Mother-In-Law
content: Twisha Sharma was discovered hanging at her husband's house in Bhopal's Katara Hills area on May 12. Originally from Noida, Twisha had entered the world of modelling between 2009 and 2012.

title: Former Uttarakhand Chief Minister BC Khanduri Dies At 91
content: Dehradun, May 19 (IANS) Former Uttarakhand Chief Minister and senior BJP leader, Major General (Retd.) Bhuwan Chandra Khanduri passed away on Tuesday at Max Hospital in Dehradun after a prolonged illness.

title: Iran Using "Disposable" Operatives For Attacks In West, US: Report
content: The case centres on 32-year-old Iraqi national Mohammed Saad Baqer al-Saadi, who US authorities say is a senior commander in the Iran-backed militia Kataib Hezbollah.

title: Texas Teacher Arrested For Sex With Teen Student Inside Classroom
content: The court documents state that Rodriguez started flirting with the girl, which later developed into sending sexually explicit messages, videos and photos.

title: Rs 1 Crore Cash, Gold Seized In Raid At Hyderabad Water Board Manager's Home
content: During the raids, officials reportedly seized over Rs 1.5 crore in cash, along with gold and silver jewellery and other valuable items, indicating assets beyond his known sources of income.

title: Probe Agency Seeks Prosecution Sanction Against Senthil Balaji In Cash For Jobs Scam
content: The case pertains to allegations that Senthil Balaji, while serving as Transport Minister in the then AIADMK government, conspired to collect money from job aspirants by promising appointments.

title: At least 2 killed, four injured in southern Spain shooting; gunman at large
content: At TOI World Desk, our dedicated team of seasoned journalists and passionate writers tirelessly sifts through the vast tapestry of global events to bring you the latest news and diverse perspectives round the clock. With an unwavering commitment to accuracy, depth, and timeliness, we strive to keep you informed about the ever-evolving world, delivering a nuanced understanding of international affairs to our readers. title: Modi in Norway LIVE: PM Modi holds bilateral talks with  Finland PM Petteri Orpo
content: President of the European Commission Ursula von der Leyen once again called for an investment agreement between India and the European Union (EU) as India-EU free trade agreement will be discussed again in the summit

title: CBSE 2026 re-evaluation: How to apply for revision of marks?
content: The results for the highly awaited exams were declared on May 13, 2026, with a dip in pass percentage being reported.

title: Kerala’s UDF govt forms expert panel to prepare White Paper on State finances
content: According to a CMO statement, the committee will be headed by former Cabinet Secretary K.M. Chandrasekhar. Additional Chief Secretary (Finance) K.R. Jyothilal has been appointed as convener

title: ‘Economic storm’ ahead; youth and small traders to be worst hit: Rahul Gandhi in Raebareli
content: The Congress MP, who is on two-day visit, also accused the prime minister of not following his own call for austerity.

content: MEA Secretary (West) Sibi George defends policy, says India’s constitution guarantees press freedoms, democracy and human rights

title: Why has the RSS called for dialogue with Pakistan?
content: What did RSS leader Dattatreya Hosabale say about ties with Pakistan and what reactions did his remarks trigger in India and Pakistan? Can his statement be read as reflecting government policy? What has the RSS’s stance on talks with Pakistan been?

title: Name a country that does not use nuke power for energy needs, asks Supreme Court
content: Petitioner confronts SHANTI Act with 40-year-old Oleum gas leak case verdict which made pvt entities engaged in hazardous activity absolutely liable to community in case of an accident

title: Petrol, diesel prices hiked 90 paise per litre in second hike within a week
content: The steepest hike in the price of the two retail fuels has been observed in Kolkata, that is, in comparison to peers Delhi, Mumbai and Chennai

title: Andhra Pradesh bans bulk fuel sales at 4,500 outlets, caps container fills at 200 litres
content: Civil Supplies Commissioner directs District Collectors to ensure petrol pumps fill fuel directly into vehicle tanks; 200-litre cap on container fills, no bulk supply

title: Kerala cabinet 2026: Full list of ministers
content: The detailed portfolios will be submitted to the Governor and will be published via gazette notification.

title: New Delhi High Court Bench to hear CBI plea against AAP leaders in Delhi excise policy case
content: The court held that the statements made by AAP leaders on social media went beyond fair criticism of a judicial order and amounted to an “attack” on the integrity and independence of the judiciary

title: ‘Yellow' alert issued for heatwave in Delhi; max temperature likely to be around 44°C
content: A 'yellow' alert stands for "be updated", while the maximum temperature is expected to hover around 44 degrees Celsius

title: U.S. nod to possible sale of support services for India’s Apache helicopters, M777A2 howitzers
content: The possible sale of support services for the helicopters and the howitzers will take place under the Foreign Military Sale channels

title: Who is Abhijeet Dipke? Inside the viral Cockroach Janta Party movement
content: What began as a satirical response to Chief Justice of India Surya Kant’s oral observation has grown into an online movement reflecting youth anger, political satire, and distrust in institutions

title: Philanthropy Asia Summit: Indian rural-focused start-ups showcase growth by promoting livelihood of farmers, poor
content: More than 30 start-ups from across Asia showcased their growth stories at the ongoing Philanthropy Asia Summit

title: Survey for township near Tata semiconductor plant shelved in Assam
content: The Morigaon district administration issued an order cancelling the project following protests from the Tiwa and Bodo communities

title: Supreme Court asks MeitY to examine PIL seeking recovery or destruction of stolen personal data of citizens on foreign servers
content: The plea sought the court's intervention to operationalise the Digital Personal Data Protection (DPDP) Act, 2023, and to mitigate the rise of "digital arrests" and extortion linked to data breaches

title: Forum appeals Centre to continue teaching French in Puducherry schools
content: The new guidelines giving importance to the teaching of two Indian languages would deprive the students of Puducherry the opportunity of learning French.

title: Messi tour organiser files complaint against former West Bengal Minister, former top cop for ‘sabotaging’ event
content: The tour organiser Satadru Dutta lodged complaint at the Bidhannagar South Police Station on May 18, 2026

title: Karnataka High Court restrains transport unions from resorting to strike on May 20
content: The court orally noted the Government’s claim that substantial demands of the unions have been already met with by releasing necessary funds

title: What is Chicken’s Neck Corridor? India’s biggest military chokepoint
content: The strategic corridor, called the ‘Chicken’s Neck’ for its shape, is a strip of land located in northern West Bengal’s Siliguri area.

title: Indian Railways approves ₹993-crore Arakkonam-Chengalpattu track doubling project
content: The sanctioning comes in the wake of the Southern Railway conducting the survey work for acquiring land last year.

title: Lack of foresight, leadership in BJP: Mallikarjun Kharge attacks PM on oil prices, Adani matter
content: Congress president’s remarks came after petrol and diesel prices were hiked by about 90 paise per litre, marking the second increase in fuel rates in less than a week

title: Supreme Court refuses to entertain plea over renaming Navi Mumbai International Airport
content: The Bench said it was not inclined to entertain the plea challenging a November 2025 order of the Bombay High Court, which had dismissed the petition.

title: West Bengal govt to roll out Annapurna Bhandar, discontinue schemes based on religious categorisation
content: The approval of Annapurna Bhandar came in the second Cabinet meeting of the BJP government, nine days after the Chief Minister and five other ministers took oath

title: India's post 2014 economic transformation  an anchor point of ties with U.S.: Envoy Vinay Kwatra
content: Vinay Kwatra said defence and security cooperation was one of the fastest-growing pillars of the India-U.S. partnership

title: Greater Cochin Development Authority’s land pooling bid hits legal hurdle
content: Shortly after 2026 Assembly elections were notified, Advocate General issued a legal opinion advising that GCDA proceed with land pooling only after issuing a notification bringing two panchayats — Kunnathunadu and Kizhakkambalam – under its ambit. GCDA had identified nearly 300 acres in these panchayats for third-phase expansion of Infopark

title: ‘World sees compromised PM panic’: Rahul slams Modi for ‘not taking’ Norwegian journalist’s questions
content: Norwegian journalist Helle Lyng, during the media briefing, questioned the alleged human rights violation in India and added: “Will the PM take critical questions from the Indian Press?”.

title: CM meets Archbishop Netto to placate Church leaders who felt bypassed in Cabinet formation
content: Latin leaders also felt they were being shrugged off by the Congress leadership, which vested the Fisheries ministry in the Indian Union Muslim League, though the Latin Catholic community comprises the majority of the State’s coastal population

title: High Court seeks stand of Arvind Kejriwal, Manish Sisodia in criminal contempt case
content: The judge took exception to several social media posts by the proposed contemnors that attributed “political allegiance” and “affiliation” to her and allegedly targeted her by posting a misleading “edited” video of a speech she gave at an educational institution in Varanasi

title: No plan to monetise gold held by temples: Finance Ministry
content: Finance Ministry clarified that claims suggesting gold plates on temple towers, doors, or other temple structures will be considered as 'Strategic Gold Reserves of India' are false, misleading, and entirely baseless.

title: Supreme Court sends Dr Subbaiah murder case accused to life imprisonment
content: The trial court had sentenced seven accused, including the father and the two sons, to death for the murder in Agust 2021

title: Shaurya Chakra awardee Vipin Wilson, a CRPF officer, honoured in Thrissur
content: CRPF officer recognised for bravery in Manipur operation that thwarted attack by insurgents on CRPF post

title: For cancer treatment in Telangana, the road still leads to Hyderabad
content: Hyderabad accounted for 26 cancer-treating hospitals, including 14 government and 12 private facilities; city recorded the highest number of treated cancer patients in Telangana at 12,517

title: Tempo-truck collision in Maharashtra’s Palghar: FIR against both drivers for traffic violations
content: Heavy traffic on the Mumbai-Ahmedabad Highway, coupled with the tempo driver taking a wrong-side shortcut in violation of traffic rules, led to the fatal crash

title: ACB raids HMWSSB General Manager’s properties, recovers ₹1.05 crore cash during searches
content: According to officials, five ACB teams began searches from the early hours of Tuesday (May 19, 2026) at properties associated with the accused, including his residence at Mallapur

title: Pest-infested flour, decayed vegetables, meat waste found at Hyderabad’s Lulu Hypermarket during food safety inspection
content: In the butchering section, drains clogged with meat waste were found emitting a pungent smell, which officials said posed a serious public health concern

title: Home Minister Anitha inaugurates ₹2.75-crore Two Town Police Station in Srikalahasti
content: ₹2.75-crore building constructed using modern technology; new digital dashboard to track bike thefts and other cases registered with police

title: New Kerala Cabinet: UDF portfolio talks run into headwinds as allies grow restive
content: Apparent dawdling in announcing appointments in government gazette suggests that haggling over ministerial portfolios continues unabated in Congress-led UDF

title: IndiGo passengers left sweating in dark after power supply disruption on Vadodara-Delhi flight
content: It took about 12-15 minutes for the engineers to fix the glitch in the GPU and another 15 minutes to restore the power supply to the aircraft, he said

title: No religious sloganeering, pelting of stones will be allowed, Suvendu warns protesters
content: ‘I am giving a clear message that there will be zero tolerance towards this kind of unrest, hooliganism and anti-national, anti-social activities,’ the newly elected West Bengal Chief Minister says

title: A.P. targets 45 MSME clusters under Cluster Development Programme, aims to generate 7,032 jobs
content: Programme expected to benefit 1,688 MSME units and create employment for 7,032 people by 2030; Common Facility Centres planned across three economic regions

content: Speaking to Indian journalists, Mr. Store says he hopes India will put “pressure” on Russia by cutting oil imports

title: ‘Tough times are coming’: Rahul Gandhi warns of ‘economic storm’ after fuel price hike
content: The TOI News Desk comprises a dedicated and tireless team of journalists who operate around the clock to deliver the most current and comprehensive news and updates to the readers of The Times of India worldwide. With an unwavering commitment to excellence in journalism, our team is at the forefront of gathering, verifying, and presenting breaking news, in-depth analysis, and insightful reports on a wide range of topics. The TOI News Desk is your trusted source for staying informed and connected to the ever-evolving global landscape, ensuring that our readers are equipped with the latest developments that matter most."
